dashboardSubtitle: Nke a bụ nchịkọta dị nkenke nke onye enyemaka ahụike akpụkpọ ahụ gị.
advancedAiAnalysisDesc: Nweta nyocha ihe egwu dị omimi nke ọnya akpụkpọ gị na AI anyị kachasị ọhụrụ, nke Bio-LLM pụrụ iche kwadoro.
newSkinAnalysisDesc: Bulite foto iji nweta nyocha ihe egwu nke AI kwadoro.
askBioLLMDesc: Ị nwere ajụjụ? AI ahụike anyị nwere ike inyere aka.
uvEnvironmentDesc: Lelee akara ihe egwu akpụkpọ ahụ n'oge n'ezie dabere na ebe ị nọ.
teleDermHubDesc: Jikọọ na ndị dọkịta akpụkpọ ahụ a kwadoro ozugbo.
geneticRiskAnalyzerDesc: Buo amụma gbasara ohere ị nwere ike ibute ọrịa melanoma nke jenetik.
dermatologyDigitalTwinDesc: Lelee ihe atụ nke ahụike akpụkpọ ahụ gị ka oge na-aga.

pageHeader.title: Nnyocha Ọnya Akpụkpọ ahụ
pageHeader.subtitle: Bulite foto iji nweta nyocha ihe egwu nke AI kwadoro.

upload.title: Bulite Foto Gị
upload.description: Pịa n'okpuru iji họrọ foto ọnya akpụkpọ ahụ.
upload.fileTypes: Na-akwado JPEG, PNG, WEBP. Maka ebumnuche mmụta naanị.

results.title: Nsonaazụ Nnyocha
results.description: Nnyocha nke AI kwadoro nke foto e nyere.
results.disclaimer: Nkwupụta: Nke a bụ nnyocha AI mepụtara maka ebumnuche mmụta ma abụghị nchọpụta ahụike. Gakwuru dọkịta ahụike ruru eru mgbe niile.

questionnaire.title: Akwụkwọ Ajụjụ Nchọpụta
questionnaire.description: Zaa ajụjụ ndị a iji nyere AI aka inụcha nnyocha ya.
questionnaire.durationLabel: Ogologo oge ole ka ọnya ahụ dịrịla?
questionnaire.sizeLabel: Gịnị bụ ihe dịka nha ya?
questionnaire.colorChangeLabel: Àgwà ya agbanweela n'oge na-adịbeghị anya?

analysis.generateAudioPrompt: Pịa bọtịnụ iji mepụta ọgụgụ ọdịyo nke nyocha ahụ.

toast.analysisFailedDesc: Enweghị ike iwepụta nkọwa AI. Biko nwaa ọzọ.
toast.assessmentRefinedDesc: Emelitela nyocha ihe egwu gị dabere na azịza gị.
toast.refinementFailedDesc: Enweghị ike inụcha nnyocha ahụ. Biko nwaa ọzọ.

pageHeader.title: Jụọ Bio-LLM Ahụike Anyị
pageHeader.subtitle: Nweta azịza ajụjụ akpụkpọ ahụ gị site na AI anyị pụrụ iche.

emptyState.title: Jụọ ajụjụ iji malite mkparịta ụka.
emptyState.example: d.g., "Gịnị bụ ihe mgbaàmà eczema na-ahụkarị?"

toast.errorDesc: Enweghị ike inweta azịza site na AI. Biko nwaa ọzọ.

pageHeader.title: Ejima Dijital nke Akpụkpọ ahụ
pageHeader.subtitle: Ihe atụ nke akpụkpọ ahụ gị nke na-emelite na nyocha ọ bụla.

evolutionCard.title: Mgbanwe Ọnya & Mmebi Anyanwụ
evolutionCard.description: Na-egosi nchikọta mmebi anyanwụ na ọdịdị a bu amụma maka ọdịnihu.
evolutionCard.predictionTitle: Ọdịdị Ọnya a Bu Amụma n'ime Afọ 1

pageHeader.title: Onye Nnyocha Ihe Egwu Jenetik
pageHeader.subtitle: Buo amụma gbasara ohere ị nwere ike ibute ọrịa melanoma nke jenetik site na iji usoro akara ihe egwu Bayesian.

formCard.title: Ozi Gị
formCard.description: A na-eji data a agbakọ akara ihe egwu gị.

form.familyHistory: Akụkọ Ezinụlọ nke Ọrịa Kansa Akpụkpọ ahụ

skinTypes.I: Ụdị I (Na-acha ọcha, na-ere ọkụ mgbe niile)
skinTypes.II: Ụdị II (Dị mma, na-ere ọkụ mgbe mgbe)
skinTypes.III: Ụdị III (Na-acha nchara nchara, na-ere ọkụ mgbe ụfọdụ)
skinTypes.IV: Ụdị IV (Na-acha nchara nchara, anaghị ere ọkụ mgbe mgbe)
skinTypes.V: Ụdị V (Na-acha nchara nchara, anaghị ere ọkụ nke ukwuu)
skinTypes.VI: Ụdị VI (Nke gbara ọchịchịrị, anaghị ere ọkụ ma ọlị)

sunExposureLevels.high: Dị elu (Na-arụ ọrụ n'èzí, na-anọkarị n'anyanwụ)

resultCard.title: Nsonaazụ Nnyocha
resultCard.description: Ihe egwu jenetik gị a bu amụma maka ọrịa melanoma.
resultCard.disclaimer: Nke a bụ amụma dabeere na usoro ndekọ ma abụghị nchọpụta ahụike. Gakwuru onye na-ahụ maka ahụike maka nnyocha zuru ezu.
